title: HLS tool crash
body:
Noticed in the pycde integration tests:

```
FAIL: PyCDE Integration :: pytorch/dot_prod_system.py (1 of 3)
******************** TEST 'PyCDE Integration :: pytorch/dot_prod_system.py' FAILED ********************
Script:
--
: 'RUN: at line 2';   rm -rf /home/jodemme/internal_circt_build/tools/circt/frontends/pycde/integration_test/pytorch/Output/dot_prod_system.py.tmp
: 'RUN: at line 3';   mlir-opt  /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/frontends/PyCDE/integration_test/pytorch/dot.linalg.mlir --one-shot-bufferize="allow-return-allocs bufferize-function-boundaries" --buffer-results-to-out-params --convert-linalg-to-affine-loops --lower-affine --convert-scf-to-cf --canonicalize > dot.cf.mlir
: 'RUN: at line 4';   hlstool dot.cf.mlir --with-esi --dynamic-hw -ir -ir-output-level 2 > dot.hw.mlir
: 'RUN: at line 5';   "/usr/bin/python3.9" /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/frontends/PyCDE/integration_test/pytorch/dot_prod_system.py /home/jodemme/internal_circt_build/tools/circt/frontends/pycde/integration_test/pytorch/Output/dot_prod_system.py.tmp 2>&1
: 'RUN: at line 6';   /home/jodemme/internal_circt_build/bin/esi-cosim-runner.py --no-aux-files --tmpdir /home/jodemme/internal_circt_build/tools/circt/frontends/pycde/integration_test/pytorch/Output/dot_prod_system.py.tmp --schema /home/jodemme/internal_circt_build/tools/circt/frontends/pycde/integration_test/pytorch/Output/dot_prod_system.py.tmp/runtime/schema.capnp /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/frontends/PyCDE/integration_test/pytorch/dot_prod_system.py `ls /home/jodemme/internal_circt_build/tools/circt/frontends/pycde/integration_test/pytorch/Output/dot_prod_system.py.tmp/hw/*.sv | grep -v driver.sv`
--
Exit Code: 134

Command Output (stderr):
--
hlstool: /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/IR/PatternMatch.cpp:276: virtual void mlir::RewriterBase::eraseOp(mlir::Operation *): Assertion `op->use_empty() && "expected 'op' to have no uses"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: hlstool dot.cf.mlir --with-esi --dynamic-hw -ir -ir-output-level 2
 #0 0x0000000001021eea llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:567:11
 #1 0x00000000010220bb PrintStackTraceSignalHandler(void*) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:641:1
 #2 0x000000000102063b llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Signals.cpp:103:5
 #3 0x00000000010227b1 SignalHandler(int) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:412:1

 #8 0x00007feeb26ae729 _nl_load_domain /build/glibc-SzIz7B/glibc-2.31/intl/loadmsgcat.c:970:34
 #9 0x00007feeb26bffd6 (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x33fd6)
#10 0x0000000001cab2d1 mlir::RewriterBase::eraseOp(mlir::Operation*) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/IR/PatternMatch.cpp:277:26
#11 0x00000000022c6672 (anonymous namespace)::GreedyPatternRewriteDriver::eraseOp(mlir::Operation*) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Transforms/Utils/GreedyPatternRewriteDriver.cpp:380:1

#17 0x0000000001e14cf2 mlir::applyPatternsAndFoldGreedily(mlir::Operation*, mlir::FrozenRewritePatternSet const&, mlir::GreedyRewriteConfig) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/include/mlir/Transforms/GreedyPatternRewriteDriver.h:71:10

#19 0x00000000023a1920 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(mlir::Pass*, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:466:21
#20 0x00000000023a1f2a mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runPipeline(mlir::OpPassManager&, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int, mlir::PassInstrumentor*, mlir::PassInstrumentation::PipelineParentInfo const*) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:529:16
#21 0x00000000023a2dae mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runOnOperationImpl(bool) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:670:20

#23 0x00000000023a190e mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(mlir::Pass*, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:463:5
#24 0x00000000023a1f2a mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runPipeline(mlir::OpPassManager&, mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int, mlir::PassInstrumentor*, mlir::PassInstrumentation::PipelineParentInfo const*) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:529:16
#25 0x00000000023a39a3 mlir::PassManager::runPasses(mlir::Operation*, mlir::AnalysisManager) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:834:10
#26 0x00000000023a38ba mlir::PassManager::run(mlir::Operation*) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/llvm/mlir/lib/Pass/Pass.cpp:814:60
#27 0x0000000000ed43ee doHLSFlowDynamic(mlir::PassManager&, mlir::ModuleOp, llvm::Optional<std::unique_ptr<llvm::ToolOutputFile, std::default_delete<llvm::ToolOutputFile> > >&) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/tools/hlstool/hlstool.cpp:385:17
#28 0x0000000000ed3e86 processBuffer(mlir::MLIRContext&, mlir::TimingScope&, llvm::SourceMgr&, llvm::Optional<std::unique_ptr<llvm::ToolOutputFile, std::default_delete<llvm::ToolOutputFile> > >&) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/tools/hlstool/hlstool.cpp:427:16
#29 0x0000000000ed3aaf processInputSplit(mlir::MLIRContext&, mlir::TimingScope&, std::unique_ptr<llvm::MemoryBuffer, std::default_delete<llvm::MemoryBuffer> >, llvm::Optional<std::unique_ptr<llvm::ToolOutputFile, std::default_delete<llvm::ToolOutputFile> > >&) /home/jodemme/FPGAToolsAndCompilers/CIRCT/circt/tools/hlstool/hlstool.cpp:449:12
```
